---
title: "TMLE Papers"
page-layout: full
---

<style>
#tmle-table-wrap table { width: 100%; }
#tmle-table-wrap th:nth-child(1),#tmle-table-wrap td:nth-child(1),#tmle-table-wrap th:nth-child(3),#tmle-table-wrap td:nth-child(3){ white-space: nowrap; }
#tmle-table-wrap th:nth-child(1),#tmle-table-wrap td:nth-child(1){ min-width: 7.5rem; }
#tmle-table-wrap th:nth-child(3),#tmle-table-wrap td:nth-child(3){ min-width: 4.5rem; }
</style>

Auto-updated list of TMLE-related papers tracked from arXiv queries.

Last refreshed: 2026-02-21T16:00:17.416Z

Total tracked papers: **215**

::: {#tmle-table-wrap}
| Published | Title | Link | Keywords |
|---|---|---|---|
| 2026-02-19 | genriesz: A Python Package for Automatic Debiased Machine Learning with Generalized Riesz Regression | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.17543v1) | tmle |
| 2026-02-18 | HAL-MLE Log-Splines Density Estimation (Part I: Univariate) | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.16259v1) | highly adaptive lasso |
| 2026-02-12 | Deep Doubly Debiased Longitudinal Effect Estimation with ICE G-Computation | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.12379v1) | tmle,  targeted minimum loss-based estimation |
| 2026-02-11 | Highly Adaptive Principal Component Regression | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.10613v1) | highly adaptive lasso |
| 2026-01-12 | A Unified Framework for Debiased Machine Learning: Riesz Representer Fitting under Bregman Divergence | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.07752v3) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2026-01-09 | A Targeted Learning Framework for Estimating Restricted Mean Survival Time Difference using Pseudo-observations | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.06296v2) | tmle,  targeted learning |
| 2026-01-09 | Estimating optimal interpretable individualized treatment regimes from a classification perspective using adaptive LASSO | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.05875v1) | super learner |
| 2025-12-26 | Targeted learning via probabilistic subpopulation matching | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.21840v1) | targeted learning |
| 2025-12-15 | Machine learning to optimize precision in the analysis of randomized trials: A journey in pre-specified, yet data-adaptive learning | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.13610v1) | tmle |
| 2025-11-24 | What Drives Cross-lingual Ranking? Retrieval Approaches with Multilingual Language Models | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.19324v1) | targeted learning |
| 2025-11-19 | Hazard-Based Targeted Maximum Likelihood Estimation for Survival in Resampling Designs | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.15045v1) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2025-11-10 | Causal Inference for Network Autoregression Model: A Targeted Minimum Loss Estimation Approach | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.06652v2) | tmle |
| 2025-11-02 | From Path Coefficients to Targeted Estimands: A Comparison of Structural Equation Models (SEM) and Targeted Maximum Likelihood Estimation (TMLE) | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.01040v2) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood,  targeted learning |
| 2025-10-30 | A Unified Theory for Causal Inference: Direct Debiased Machine Learning via Bregman-Riesz Regression | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.26783v1) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2025-10-27 | Direct Debiased Machine Learning via Bregman Divergence Minimization | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.23534v2) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2025-10-25 | Causal Effect Estimation with TMLE: Handling Missing Data and Near-Violations of Positivity | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.22202v1) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2025-10-19 | Causal inference for calibrated scaling interventions on time-to-event processes | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.16798v2) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2025-10-18 | Estimate Time-Varying Exposure Effects via Ensemble Learning-based Marginal Structural Model with Application to Adolescent Cognitive Development Study | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.16298v1) | targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2025-10-15 | postcard: An R Package for Marginal Effect Estimation with or without Prognostic Score Adjustment | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.13347v1) | super learner |
| 2025-09-30 | Integrating noise into PhET simulations to promote student learning of measurement uncertainty | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.25769v1) | targeted learning |
| 2025-09-29 | Reinforcement Mid-Training | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.24375v1) | targeted learning |
| 2025-09-03 | The super learner for time-to-event outcomes: A tutorial | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.03315v2) | super learner |
| 2025-08-13 | Linking GFAP Levels to Speech Anomalies in Acute Brain Injury: A Simulation Based Study | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.10130v1) | targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2025-08-13 | Developing an Inhaled NEU1 Inhibitor for Cystic Fibrosis via Pharmacokinetic and Biophysical Modeling | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.10082v1) | targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2025-08-12 | Efficient Statistical Estimation for Sequential Adaptive Experiments with Implications for Adaptive Designs | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.09135v2) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2025-08-12 | Debiased machine learning for combining probability and non-probability survey data | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.08948v2) | targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2025-07-31 | "Within-trial" prognostic score adjustment is targeted maximum likelihood estimation | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.23446v2) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2025-07-21 | Bayesian implementation of Targeted Maximum Likelihood Estimation for uncertainty quantification in causal effect estimation | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.15909v1) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2025-07-16 | Targeted Deep Architectures: A TMLE-Based Framework for Robust Causal Inference in Neural Networks | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.12435v1) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2025-07-15 | Constructing targeted minimum loss/maximum likelihood estimators: a simple illustration to build intuition | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.11680v1) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2025-07-15 | Try Harder: Hard Sample Generation and Learning for Clothes-Changing Person Re-ID | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.11119v1) | targeted learning |
| 2025-07-15 | Constructing Confidence Intervals for Infinite-Dimensional Functional Parameters by Highly Adaptive Lasso | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.10511) | highly adaptive lasso |
| 2025-07-14 | Constructing Confidence Intervals for Infinite-Dimensional Functional Parameters by Highly Adaptive Lasso | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.10511v3) | highly adaptive lasso |
| 2025-06-26 | Estimating Average Causal Effects with Incomplete Exposure and Confounders | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.21786v1) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2025-06-26 | Causal inference via implied interventions | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.21501v1) | highly adaptive lasso |
| 2025-06-20 | Regularized Targeted Maximum Likelihood Estimation in Highly Adaptive Lasso Implied Working Models | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17214v1) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood,  highly adaptive lasso |
| 2025-06-06 | When Measurement Mediates the Effect of Interest | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.06267v2) | tmle,  targeted minimum loss-based estimation |
| 2025-06-03 | Causal Inference with Missing Exposures and Missing Outcomes | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.03336v2) | tmle,  super learner |
| 2025-06-03 | KARE-RAG: Knowledge-Aware Refinement and Enhancement for RAG | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.02503v1) | targeted learning |
| 2025-06-03 | Co-Evidential Fusion with Information Volume for Medical Image Segmentation | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.02492v1) | targeted learning |
| 2025-05-27 | Towards Objective Fine-tuning: How LLMs' Prior Knowledge Causes Potential Poor Calibration? | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.20903v1) | targeted learning |
| 2025-05-20 | Semi-parametric efficient estimation of small genetic effects in large-scale population cohorts | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.14675v1) | tmle |
| 2025-05-15 | Targeted Learning Estimation of Sampling Variance for Improved Inference | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.10624v1) | targeted maximum likelihood,  targeted learning |
| 2025-05-15 | Ordered-subsets Multi-diffusion Model for Sparse-view CT Reconstruction | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.09985v1) | targeted learning |
| 2025-05-01 | On the Mechanistic Interpretability of Neural Networks for Causality in Bio-statistics | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.00555v1) | tmle,  targeted minimum loss-based estimation |
| 2025-04-30 | Assessing Racial Disparities in Healthcare Expenditures via Mediator Distribution Shifts | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.21688v2) | super learner |
| 2025-04-04 | Weak instrumental variables due to nonlinearities in panel data: A Super Learner Control Function estimator | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.03228v8) | super learner |
| 2025-04-03 | QID: Efficient Query-Informed ViTs in Data-Scarce Regimes for OCR-free Visual Document Understanding | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.02971v2) | targeted learning |
| 2025-03-23 | Adaptive Multi-Fidelity Reinforcement Learning for Variance Reduction in Engineering Design Optimization | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.18229v1) | targeted learning |
| 2025-02-23 | Predictive Modeling: BIM Command Recommendation Based on Large-scale Usage Logs | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.05319v2) | targeted learning |
| 2025-02-22 | Understanding the Emergence of Multimodal Representation Alignment | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.16282v2) | targeted learning |
| 2025-02-11 | Cost Effectiveness Analyses for Sequential Multiple Assignment Randomized Trials | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.07973v1) | targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2025-02-06 | Targeted Learning for Data Fairness | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.04309v1) | targeted learning |
| 2025-01-31 | Score-Preserving Targeted Maximum Likelihood Estimation | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.00200v1) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood,  highly adaptive lasso |
| 2025-01-30 | U-aggregation: Unsupervised Aggregation of Multiple Learning Algorithms | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.18084v1) | super learner |
| 2025-01-29 | An Estimator-Robust Design for Augmenting Randomized Controlled Trial with External Real-World Data | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.17835v1) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2025-01-27 | LLM-powered Multi-agent Framework for Goal-oriented Learning in Intelligent Tutoring System | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.15749v1) | targeted learning |
| 2025-01-18 | Adaptive-TMLE for the Average Treatment Effect based on Randomized Controlled Trial Augmented with Real-World Data | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.07186v2) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2025-01-10 | Technical Note: Targeted Maximum Likelihood Estimator for an ATE Standardized for New Target Population | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.06381v1) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2024-12-20 | Bayesian Optimization for Unknown Cost-Varying Variable Subsets with No-Regret Costs | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2412.15863v1) | targeted learning |
| 2024-12-19 | Assessing treatment effects in observational data with missing confounders: A comparative study of practical doubly-robust and traditional missing data methods | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2412.15012v2) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2024-12-13 | What if we had built a prediction model with a survival super learner instead of a Cox model 10 years ago? | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2412.10252v1) | super learner |
| 2024-12-11 | Bootstrapping Heterogeneous Graph Representation Learning via Large Language Models: A Generalized Approach | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2412.08038v3) | targeted learning |
| 2024-12-06 | Estimating the treatment effect over time under general interference through deep learner integrated TMLE | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2412.04799v1) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2024-11-24 | Unveiling the Superior Paradigm: A Comparative Study of Source-Free Domain Adaptation and Unsupervised Domain Adaptation | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2411.15844v1) | targeted learning |
| 2024-11-22 | Double Machine Learning for Adaptive Causal Representation in High-Dimensional Data | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2411.14665v1) | super learner |
| 2024-11-16 | Adaptive Learning of Design Strategies over Non-Hierarchical Multi-Fidelity Models via Policy Alignment | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2411.10841v1) | targeted learning |
| 2024-11-15 | G-computation for increasing performances of clinical trials with individual randomization and binary response | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2411.10089v1) | super learner |
| 2024-11-12 | Targeted Maximum Likelihood Estimation for Integral Projection Models in Population Ecology | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2411.08150v1) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2024-11-04 | Targeted Learning for Variable Importance | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2411.02221v2) | targeted learning |
| 2024-10-25 | trajmsm: An R package for Trajectory Analysis and Causal Modeling | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.19682v2) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2024-10-24 | Doubly Robust Nonparametric Efficient Estimation for Provider Evaluation | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.19073v1) | targeted minimum loss-based estimation |
| 2024-10-09 | Use of Real-World Data and Real-World Evidence in Rare Disease Drug Development: A Statistical Perspective | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.06586v1) | targeted learning |
| 2024-09-29 | Automatic debiasing of neural networks via moment-constrained learning | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.19777v2) | targeted learning |
| 2024-09-17 | Performance of Cross-Validated Targeted Maximum Likelihood Estimation | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.11265v2) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood,  super learner |
| 2024-09-06 | Leveraging Machine Learning for Official Statistics: A Statistical Manifesto | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.04365v1) | tmle |
| 2024-08-26 | Effects Among the Affected | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.14691v1) | targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2024-08-19 | Non-Plug-In Estimators Could Outperform Plug-In Estimators: a Cautionary Note and a Diagnosis | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.10091v1) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2024-08-17 | [Invited Discussion] Randomization Tests to Address Disruptions in Clinical Trials: A Report from the NISS Ingram Olkin Forum Series on Unplanned Clinical Trial Disruptions | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.09060v1) | targeted learning |
| 2024-08-13 | A comparison of methods for estimating the average treatment effect on the treated for externally controlled trials | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.07193v2) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2024-08-09 | A Density Ratio Super Learner | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.04796v1) | super learner,  super learning |
| 2024-08-05 | An Online Meta-Level Adaptive-Design Framework with Targeted Learning Inference: Applications to Evaluating and Utilizing Surrogate Outcomes in Adaptive Designs | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.02667v5) | targeted maximum likelihood,  targeted learning |
| 2024-07-25 | Doubly Robust Targeted Estimation of Conditional Average Treatment Effects for Time-to-event Outcomes with Competing Risks | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.18389v1) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2024-07-04 | A fast neural hybrid Newton solver adapted to implicit methods for nonlinear dynamics | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.03945v3) | targeted learning |
| 2024-06-16 | Data-Adaptive Identification of Effect Modifiers through Stochastic Shift Interventions and Cross-Validated Targeted Learning | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.10792v2) | tmle,  targeted minimum loss-based estimation,  targeted learning |
| 2024-06-09 | HAL-Based Plug-in Estimation with Pointwise Asymptotic Normality of the Causal Dose-Response Curve | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.05607v4) | highly adaptive lasso |
| 2024-06-06 | Causal Inference in Randomized Trials with Partial Clustering | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.04505v2) | tmle,  targeted minimum loss-based estimation |
| 2024-05-27 | The joint survival super learner: A super learner for right-censored data | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17259v2) | super learner,  super learning |
| 2024-05-24 | Causal machine learning methods and use of cross-fitting in settings with high-dimensional confounding | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.15242v3) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood,  super learner |
| 2024-05-21 | Tutorly: Turning Programming Videos Into Apprenticeship Learning Environments with LLMs | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.12946v1) | targeted learning |
| 2024-05-15 | C-Learner: Constrained Learning for Causal Inference | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.09493v6) | targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2024-05-14 | Exploring Graph-based Knowledge: Multi-Level Feature Distillation via Channels Relational Graph | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.08547v2) | targeted learning |
| 2024-05-06 | Doubly Robust Causal Effect Estimation under Networked Interference via Targeted Learning | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.03342v3) | targeted learning |
| 2024-04-26 | Pseudo-Observations and Super Learner for the Estimation of the Restricted Mean Survival Time | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.17211v1) | super learner |
| 2024-04-12 | Shifting the Paradigm: Estimating Heterogeneous Treatment Effects in the Development of Walkable Cities Design | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.08208v2) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2024-04-11 | A Multi-Expert Large Language Model Architecture for Verilog Code Generation | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.08029v1) | targeted learning |
| 2024-04-06 | Optimization of Lightweight Malware Detection Models For AIoT Devices | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.04567v1) | super learner |
| 2024-04-05 | Longitudinal Targeted Minimum Loss-based Estimation with Temporal-Difference Heterogeneous Transformer | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.04399v2) | tmle,  targeted minimum loss-based estimation |
| 2024-04-03 | Nonparametric efficient causal estimation of the intervention-specific expected number of recurrent events with continuous-time targeted maximum likelihood and highly adaptive lasso estimation | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.01736) | highly adaptive lasso |
| 2024-04-02 | Nonparametric efficient causal estimation of the intervention-specific expected number of recurrent events with continuous-time targeted maximum likelihood and highly adaptive lasso estimation | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.01736v4) | targeted maximum likelihood,  highly adaptive lasso |
| 2024-01-30 | Recovery and inference of causal effects with sequential adjustment for confounding and attrition | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2401.16990v6) | tmle |
| 2024-01-08 | Two-Step Targeted Minimum-Loss Based Estimation for Non-Negative Two-Part Outcomes | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2401.04263v2) | tmle |
| 2023-11-30 | Geometry-Aware Normalizing Wasserstein Flows for Optimal Causal Inference | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2311.18826v4) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2023-11-25 | Modelling wildland fire burn severity in California using a spatial Super Learner approach | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2311.16187v1) | super learner |
| 2023-11-06 | Practical considerations for variable screening in the super learner | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2311.03313v2) | super learner |
| 2023-10-30 | Quantile Super Learning for independent and online settings with application to solar power forecasting | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.19343v1) | super learning |
| 2023-10-29 | concrete: Targeted Estimation of Survival and Competing Risks in Continuous Time | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.19197v2) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood,  super learner |
| 2023-10-12 | Personalised dynamic super learning: an application in predicting hemodiafiltration convection volumes | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.08479v2) | super learner,  super learning |
| 2023-10-05 | Animatable Virtual Humans: Learning pose-dependent human representations in UV space for interactive performance synthesis | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.03615v1) | targeted learning |
| 2023-10-05 | Applying the causal roadmap to longitudinal national Danish registry data: a case study of second-line diabetes medication and dementia | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.03235v2) | targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2023-09-23 | Targeted Learning on Variable Importance Measure for Heterogeneous Treatment Effect | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2309.13324v1) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood,  targeted learning |
| 2023-09-20 | Optimizing Dynamic Predictions from Joint Models using Super Learning | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2309.11472v2) | super learning |
| 2023-09-07 | The Causal Roadmap and Simulations to Improve the Rigor and Reproducibility of Real-Data Applications | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2309.03952v5) | tmle,  targeted minimum loss-based estimation |
| 2023-08-08 | SLEM: Machine Learning for Path Modeling and Causal Inference with Super Learner Equation Modeling | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2308.04365v6) | super learner |
| 2023-07-11 | Considerations for Master Protocols Using External Controls | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2307.05050v2) | targeted learning |
| 2023-06-14 | Kernel Debiased Plug-in Estimation: Simultaneous, Automated Debiasing without Influence Functions for Many Target Parameters | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2306.08598v5) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2023-06-13 | ACE: Active Learning for Causal Inference with Expensive Experiments | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2306.07480v1) | targeted learning |
| 2023-05-17 | Nonparametric estimation of the interventional disparity indirect effect among the exposed | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.10095v1) | tmle,  targeted minimum loss-based estimation |
| 2023-05-12 | A Causal Roadmap for Hybrid Randomized and Real-World Data Designs: Case Study of Semaglutide and Cardiovascular Outcomes | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.07647v1) | targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2023-05-03 | Semiparametric Discovery and Estimation of Interaction in Mixed Exposures using Stochastic Interventions | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.01849v3) | targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2023-04-11 | A nonparametric framework for treatment effect modifier discovery in high dimensions | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2304.05323v2) | targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2023-04-11 | Targeted Maximum Likelihood Based Estimation for Longitudinal Mediation Analysis | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2304.04904v1) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood,  highly adaptive lasso |
| 2023-03-20 | Semiparametric logistic regression for inference on relative vaccine efficacy in case-only studies with informative missingness | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2303.11462v2) | targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2023-03-13 | Application of targeted maximum likelihood estimation in public health and epidemiological studies: a systematic review | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2303.07329v1) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood,  targeted learning |
| 2023-02-15 | Discovery of Critical Thresholds in Mixed Exposures and Estimation of Policy Intervention Effects using Targeted Learning | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2302.07976v3) | targeted learning |
| 2023-02-03 | VR-LENS: Super Learning-based Cybersickness Detection and Explainable AI-Guided Deployment in Virtual Reality | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2302.01985v1) | super learner,  super learning |
| 2023-01-31 | Higher Order Spline Highly Adaptive Lasso Estimators of Functional Parameters: Pointwise Asymptotic Normality and Uniform Convergence Rates | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2301.13354v1) | highly adaptive lasso |
| 2023-01-27 | Multi-task Highly Adaptive Lasso | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2301.12029v1) | highly adaptive lasso |
| 2023-01-25 | Inference in Marginal Structural Models by Automatic Targeted Bayesian and Minimum Loss-Based Estimation | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2301.10630v1) | targeted minimum loss-based estimation |
| 2022-12-30 | Data-driven photometric redshift estimation from type Ia supernovae light curves | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2212.14668v2) | super learning |
| 2022-12-07 | Combining Planning, Reasoning and Reinforcement Learning to solve Industrial Robot Tasks | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2212.03570v1) | targeted learning |
| 2022-12-05 | Adaptive Sequential Surveillance with Network and Temporal Dependence | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2212.02422v1) | super learner |
| 2022-11-26 | Efficient Targeted Learning of Heterogeneous Treatment Effects for Multiple Subgroups | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2211.14671v1) | tmle,  targeted learning |
| 2022-10-31 | Adaptive Selection of the Optimal Strategy to Improve Precision and Power in Randomized Trials | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2210.17453v3) | tmle |
| 2022-10-11 | Experiment-selector cross-validated targeted maximum likelihood estimator for hybrid RCT-external data studies | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2210.05802v4) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2022-10-07 | Efficient and Robust Approaches for Analysis of SMARTs: Illustration using the ADAPT-R Trial | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2210.03316v1) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2022-09-20 | Neural Graph Databases | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2209.09732v2) | targeted learning |
| 2022-09-15 | Frameworks for Estimating Causal Effects in Observational Settings: Comparing Confounder Adjustment and Instrumental Variables | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2209.06984v3) | tmle |
| 2022-08-30 | Tree-based Subgroup Discovery In Electronic Health Records: Heterogeneity of Treatment Effects for DTG-containing Therapies | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2208.14329v1) | targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2022-08-19 | Blurring cluster randomized trials and observational studies using Two-Stage TMLE to address sub-sampling, missingness, and minimal independent units | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2208.09508v2) | tmle,  targeted minimum loss-based estimation |
| 2022-08-15 | Evaluating and improving real-world evidence with Targeted Learning | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2208.07283v1) | targeted learning |
| 2022-08-01 | Using Targeted Maximum Likelihood Estimation to Estimate Treatment Effect with Longitudinal Continuous or Binary Data: A Systematic Evaluation of 28 Diabetes Clinical Trials | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2208.01168v1) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2022-06-30 | Targeted learning in observational studies with multi-valued treatments: An evaluation of antipsychotic drug treatment safety | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2206.15367v6) | tmle,  targeted minimum loss-based estimation,  targeted learning |
| 2022-06-23 | Forecasting the cost of drought events in France by Super Learning | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2206.11545v2) | super learner,  super learning |
| 2022-06-12 | Identifying and estimating effects of sustained interventions under parallel trends assumptions | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2206.05788v2) | targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2022-05-17 | Targeted learning: Towards a future informed by real-world evidence | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2205.08643v2) | targeted minimum loss-based estimation,  targeted learning,  super learning |
| 2022-05-13 | A Huber loss-based super learner with applications to healthcare expenditures | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2205.06870v1) | super learner,  super learning |
| 2022-04-23 | Double Machine Learning Methods for Estimating Average Treatment Effects: A Comparative Study | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2204.10969v5) | targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2022-04-13 | Practical considerations for specifying a super learner | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2204.06139v4) | super learner |
| 2022-03-23 | Explaining Practical Differences Between Treatment Effect Estimators with High Dimensional Asymptotics | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2203.12538v2) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2022-03-19 | CausalDeepCENT: Deep Learning for Causal Prediction of Individual Event Times | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2203.10207v1) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2022-03-09 | SuperCone: Unified User Segmentation over Heterogeneous Experts via Concept Meta-learning | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2203.07029v2) | super learning |
| 2021-12-15 | A Targeted Approach to Confounder Selection for High-Dimensional Data | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2112.08495v1) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2021-12-10 | Handling missing data when estimating causal effects with Targeted Maximum Likelihood Estimation | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2112.05274v4) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2021-10-24 | Evaluating shifts in mobility and COVID-19 case rates in U.S. counties: A demonstration of modified treatment policies for causal inference with continuous exposures | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2110.12529v3) | tmle,  targeted minimum loss-based estimation,  super learner |
| 2021-10-19 | CIMTx: An R package for causal inference with multiple treatments using observational data | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2110.10276v3) | targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2021-10-18 | Defining and Estimating Effects in Cluster Randomized Trials: A Methods Comparison | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2110.09633v4) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2021-10-12 | Evaluating the Impact of State-Level Public Masking Mandates on New COVID-19 Cases and Deaths in the United States: A Demonstration of the Causal Roadmap | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2110.06115v1) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood,  super learner |
| 2021-09-28 | Evaluating the Robustness of Targeted Maximum Likelihood Estimators via Realistic Simulations in Nutrition Intervention Trials | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2109.14048v1) | targeted maximum likelihood,  highly adaptive lasso |
| 2021-09-21 | Personalized Online Machine Learning | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2109.10452v1) | super learner |
| 2021-07-28 | One-step ahead sequential Super Learning from short times series of many slightly dependent data, and anticipating the cost of natural disasters | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2107.13291v1) | super learner,  super learning |
| 2021-07-23 | Efficient nonparametric estimation of the covariate-adjusted threshold-response function, a support-restricted stochastic intervention | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2107.11459v2) | tmle |
| 2021-07-04 | One-step TMLE for targeting cause-specific absolute risks and survival curves | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2107.01537v2) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2021-06-29 | Two-Stage TMLE to Reduce Bias and Improve Efficiency in Cluster Randomized Trials | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2106.15737v2) | tmle |
| 2021-06-21 | Estimation of time-specific intervention effects on continuously distributed time-to-event outcomes by targeted maximum likelihood estimation | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2106.11009v1) | targeted maximum likelihood,  highly adaptive lasso |
| 2021-05-05 | Continuous-time targeted minimum loss-based estimation of intervention-specific mean outcomes | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2105.02088v1) | tmle,  targeted minimum loss-based estimation,  highly adaptive lasso |
| 2021-05-01 | Detecting bid-rigging coalitions in different countries and auction formats | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2105.00337v1) | super learner |
| 2021-01-29 | Performance and Application of Estimators for the Value of an Optimal Dynamic Treatment Rule | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2101.12333v4) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2021-01-15 | Higher Order Targeted Maximum Likelihood Estimation | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2101.06290v3) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood,  highly adaptive lasso |
| 2021-01-11 | Modeling Treatment Effect Modification in Multidrug-Resistant Tuberculosis in an Individual Patient Data Meta-Analysis | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2101.03997v2) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2020-07-02 | Multi-resolution Super Learner for Voxel-wise Classification of Prostate Cancer Using Multi-parametric MRI | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2007.00816v2) | super learner |
| 2020-06-16 | Model Agnostic Combination for Ensemble Learning | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2006.09025v1) | super learner |
| 2020-06-15 | Targeted Maximum Likelihood Estimation of Community-based Causal Effect of Community-Level Stochastic Interventions | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2006.08675v1) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2020-06-15 | tmleCommunity: A R Package Implementing Target Maximum Likelihood Estimation for Community-level Data | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2006.08553v1) | tmle,  targeted minimum loss-based estimation |
| 2020-05-22 | Nonparametric inverse probability weighted estimators based on the highly adaptive lasso | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2005.11303v2) | highly adaptive lasso |
| 2020-04-21 | Machine learning for causal inference: on the use of cross-fit estimators | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2004.10337v4) | targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2020-04-03 | Stacked Generalizations in Imbalanced Fraud Data Sets using Resampling Methods | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2004.01764v1) | super learner |
| 2020-03-18 | Bootstrap Bias Corrected Cross Validation applied to Super Learning | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2003.08342v1) | super learner,  super learning |
| 2020-03-04 | Estimating the Effect of Central Bank Independence on Inflation Using Longitudinal Targeted Maximum Likelihood Estimation | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2003.02208v7) | targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2020-01-17 | Estimation of Causal Effects of Multiple Treatments in Observational Studies with a Binary Outcome | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2001.06483v1) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2019-12-13 | Conditional Super Learner | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1912.06675v1) | super learner |
| 2019-12-13 | More Efficient Off-Policy Evaluation through Regularized Targeted Learning | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1912.06292v1) | targeted maximum likelihood,  targeted learning |
| 2019-12-03 | Confounding Adjustment Methods for Multi-level Treatment Comparisons Under Lack of Positivity and Unknown Model Specification | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1912.01517v2) | targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2019-10-26 | SUPER Learning: A Supervised-Unsupervised Framework for Low-Dose CT Image Reconstruction | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1910.12024v1) | super learning |
| 2019-10-20 | Targeted Estimation of Heterogeneous Treatment Effect in Observational Survival Analysis | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1910.08877v2) | targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2019-09-27 | A Data-Adaptive Targeted Learning Approach of Evaluating Viscoelastic Assay Driven Trauma Treatment Protocols | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1909.12881v2) | tmle,  targeted learning,  super learning |
| 2019-09-09 | Super ensemble learning for daily streamflow forecasting: Large-scale demonstration and comparison with multiple machine learning algorithms | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1909.04131v2) | super learner,  super learning |
| 2019-08-16 | Efficient Estimation of Pathwise Differentiable Target Parameters with the Undersmoothed Highly Adaptive Lasso | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1908.05607) | highly adaptive lasso |
| 2019-08-14 | Efficient Estimation of Pathwise Differentiable Target Parameters with the Undersmoothed Highly Adaptive Lasso | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1908.05607v2) | highly adaptive lasso |
| 2019-07-10 | A Highly Efficient Distributed Deep Learning System For Automatic Speech Recognition | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1907.05701v1) | super learner |
| 2019-05-31 | Targeted Estimation of L2 Distance Between Densities and its Application to Geo-spatial Data | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1905.13414v1) | targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2019-05-23 | Nonparametric Bootstrap Inference for the Targeted Highly Adaptive LASSO Estimator | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1905.10299v2) | tmle,  highly adaptive lasso |
| 2019-03-05 | Tutorial: Deriving The Efficient Influence Curve for Large Models | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1903.01706v3) | targeted maximum likelihood |
| 2019-03-01 | Machine learning in policy evaluation: new tools for causal inference | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1903.00402v1) | targeted maximum likelihood,  super learner |
| 2018-11-15 | Kernel Smoothing of the Treatment Effect CDF | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1811.06514v4) | tmle |
| 2018-11-12 | An Easy Implementation of CV-TMLE | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1811.04573v2) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood,  targeted learning |
| 2018-11-09 | A Fundamental Measure of Treatment Effect Heterogeneity | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1811.03745v3) | tmle |
| 2018-11-03 | Canonical Least Favorable Submodels:A New TMLE Procedure for Multidimensional Parameters | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1811.01261v3) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood,  targeted learning |
| 2018-10-29 | Complier stochastic direct effects: identification and robust estimation | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1810.12452v1) | tmle |
| 2018-09-07 | A Primer on Causality in Data Science | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1809.02408v2) | tmle,  targeted maximum likelihood,  super learner |
| 2018-06-18 | Robust inference on the average treatment effect using the outcome highly adaptive lasso | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1806.06784v3) | highly adaptive lasso |
| 2018-05-21 | Super learning in the SAS system | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1805.08058v3) | super learner,  super learning |
| 2018-04-01 | Flexible model selection for mechanistic network models | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1804.00237v2) | super learner |
| 2018-03-06 | Deep Super Learner: A Deep Ensemble for Classification Problems | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1803.02323v1) | super learner,  super learning |
| 2018-02-08 | Data-adaptive doubly robust instrumental variable methods for treatment effect heterogeneity | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1802.02821v2) | tmle,  super learner |
| 2017-10-23 | Benchmark of Deep Learning Models on Large Healthcare MIMIC Datasets | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1710.08531v1) | super learner |
| 2017-09-19 | Uniform Consistency of the Highly Adaptive Lasso Estimator of Infinite Dimensional Parameters | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1709.06256v1) | tmle,  highly adaptive lasso |
| 2017-08-30 | Finite Sample Inference for Targeted Learning | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1708.09502v1) | tmle,  targeted learning |
| 2017-05-06 | Sequential Double Robustness in Right-Censored Longitudinal Models | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1705.02459v2) | targeted minimum loss-based estimation |
| 2017-04-05 | The Relative Performance of Ensemble Methods with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks for Image Classification | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1704.01664v1) | super learner |
| 2017-03-07 | Scalable Collaborative Targeted Learning for High-Dimensional Data | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1703.02237v1) | tmle,  targeted minimum loss-based estimation,  targeted learning |
| 2017-03-07 | Propensity score prediction for electronic healthcare databases using Super Learner and High-dimensional Propensity Score Methods | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1703.02236v2) | super learner |
| 2017-02-15 | Targeted Learning Ensembles for Optimal Individualized Treatment Rules with Time-to-Event Outcomes | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1702.04682v2) | targeted learning,  super learning |
| 2015-11-26 | Second-Order Inference for the Mean of a Variable Missing at Random | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1511.08369v1) | tmle,  targeted minimum loss-based estimation |
| 2012-09-27 | Classification in postural style | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1209.6221v1) | targeted maximum likelihood |
:::
